methodology.timestamp_used: Last Status Update Time -> Status Timestamp
methodology.what_it_measures: Time from payment marked as Sent by us to external payout status update received

status_meanings.Delivery Confirmed: Bank confirmed money in recipient account (TRUE received). Only SEPA payments.
status_meanings.Paid: Payout partner (RIA/Cash/MobileWallet) confirmed payment to recipient. Considered received.
status_meanings.Processed: Payment processed by network (FPS/Swift/Domestic) but NOT confirmed as received by recipient.

methodology.excluded: Outliers >30 days (2 rows), empty status (2 rows)
